title: derris indica
intro: Derris indica, also known as the Tuberose or Queen of the night, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds which contain rotenone, a toxic compound used as an insecticide. The health benefits of Derris indica include its use as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic, making it a treatment for various ailments such as fever, coughs, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Derris indica include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
